CMS_HOURS_NOTE: Weekend brunch Sat & Sun · Happy hour weekdays · 4–7 PM
CMS_HERO_DESC: DFW's most electrifying bar & grill — handcrafted cocktails, draft beers on tap, fire-grilled plates, and premium upscale lounge seating. Hookah. Live bands & DJs. Weekend brunch. Covered patio and open-air courtyard. Right by Grandscape.
CMS_ABOUT_TITLE: More Than a Bar. An Entertainment Destination
CMS_ABOUT_SUBTITLE: Twisted is where The Colony comes together — trivia nights, live performances, themed parties, and community celebrations from open to close. Walk in with your crew, book a private event, or settle in for the evening. Open until 2 AM every night.
CMS_GALLERY_SPACE_TITLE: A Modern Sports Bar in The Colony
CMS_GALLERY_SPACE_BODY1: Wide-screen TVs, comfortable booths, patio seating, and a full bar — whether you're catching the game or meeting friends for dinner, Twisted has you covered.
CMS_GALLERY_SPACE_BODY2: Located at Cascades Court near Grandscape and Topgolf — the go-to spot for North Dallas suburbs including Frisco, Lewisville, Plano, and Carrollton.
CMS_GALLERY_BAR_BODY1: Signature cocktails, beer and wine, and premium hookah in a comfortable lounge setting — whether you're here for the game or a night out with friends.
CMS_GALLERY_BAR_BODY2: Ask your server about drink specials and hookah flavors.
CMS_EVENTS_BODY: Happy hour, karaoke, live music, and weekend brunch — seven days of drinks, food, and good vibes at Twisted near Grandscape.
CMS_LINKS_TAGLINE: Sports Bar & Grill · The Colony, TX
CMS_MENU_INTRO: American bar and grill favorites with a twist. Vegetarian and gluten-free options available — ask your server for specifics.
CMS_MENU_NOTE: Ask your server for pricing, availability, and dietary details.
CMS_MENU_BODY:
Appetizers

Twisted Potato

Ribbon crispy potato topped with house seasoning salt.

Chips & Salsa

Homemade chips & salsa.

Chips & Queso

Homemade chips & queso.

Chips & Guacamole

Homemade chips & fresh guacamole. Made to order.

Loaded Nachos

Corn chips, beans, pico de gallo, jalapeños, melted cheese, sour cream & guacamole. Chicken, steak, or shrimp available.

Hummus

Mashed chickpeas blended with lemon juice & garlic. Served with warm pita bread & cucumber chips.

Twisted Heart

Giant pretzel served with queso & spicy mustard.

Falafel

Served with pita bread & garlic sauce.

Mozzarella Sticks

Six mozzarella cheese sticks served with marinara sauce.

Jalapeño Strips

Fresh jalapeños hand breaded & fried golden. Served with house ranch.

Fried Pickles

Breaded fried pickles served with creamy Cajun sauce.

Loaded Tots

Crispy tots topped with melted cheese, sour cream, pico de gallo, crispy bacon bits & green onions.

Flautas

Chicken & cheese taquitos topped with salsa verde, sour cream & queso fresco.

Bang on Shrimp

Fried shrimp with a crunch covered in creamy spicy sauce. Topped with sliced jalapeños.

Samosa

Fried pastry stuffed with potatoes, onions & peas. Served with cilantro mint sauce.

Soup & Salad

Add salmon, shrimp, steak, or chicken to any salad — ask your server.

Caesar Salad

Whole romaine leaves, fresh shaved parmesan, lemon wedge, garlic croutons.

Cobb Salad

Romaine lettuce, boiled egg, bacon, shredded cheese, blue cheese & avocado.

Nashville Hot Chicken Salad

Hand battered fried chicken tossed with hot Nashville sauce.

Buffalo Chicken Salad

Crispy hand-breaded chicken covered in buffalo sauce with pickled onions, tomato & mixed cheese.

Twisted Garden Salad

Mixed greens, red onion, cherry tomato, shredded cheese, carrots, cucumbers & croutons.

Chicken Tortilla Soup

Chicken soup with veggies & beans topped with tortilla, avocado, lime & cilantro.

Dressings: Ranch, Honey Mustard, Caesar, Blue Cheese, Balsamic Vinaigrette, Thousand Island, Italian

Wings

Twisted Naked Wings

Classic naked wings.

Wish You Were A Wing

Boneless breaded wings.

Sauce heat: Hot to Mild

  • Cajun

Wet Sauce

Main Entrées

Chicken 65

Fried battered chicken tossed in our house 65 sauce with fresh chilies. Served with flat bread.

Fish & Chips

Two pieces of cod battered fish with tartar sauce. Served with French fries.

Chicken Tenders & Fries

Four all-white chicken strips hand battered & fried. Served with fries & dipping sauce.

Surf & Turf

10oz ribeye steak topped with grilled shrimp. Served with choice of 2 sides.

Catfish Plate

Fried, blackened, or grilled. Served with choice of 2 sides.

Grilled Chicken

Grilled chicken breast served with choice of 2 sides.

Grilled Salmon

Blackened or grilled salmon with 2 sides & house made tartar sauce.

Chicken Quesadilla

Stuffed with blended cheese & pico de gallo. Steak or shrimp available.

Veggie Quesadilla

Stuffed with cheese, mushrooms, peppers, spinach, onions & pico de gallo.

Sides

Mac & Cheese, Tots, Veggie Mix, Fries, Corn, Green Beans, Mashed Potatoes, Onion Rings, Fried Okra, Side Salad, Pita Bread

Handhelds

Sandwiches served with french fries. Sub tots or onion rings, or gluten-free bun — ask your server.

Nashville Chicken Sandwich

Fried chicken breast dipped in Nashville sauce with cheese, mayo, LTOP.

Angus Beef Burger

Fresh beef patty with cheese, LTOP & mayo.

Turkey Burger

Grilled turkey patty with cheese, mayo & LTOP.

Twisted Garden Burger

Crispy jumbo kale veggie burger grilled to perfection with LTOP.

California Grilled Chicken Sandwich

Grilled chicken breast with Swiss cheese, avocado, spicy mayo, lettuce, tomato & red onion.

Grilled Cheese

Grilled sourdough bread with ribbon crispy potatoes topped with house seasoning.

Tacos

Baja Fish Taco (3)

Battered fried Arctic cod topped with creamy coleslaw & spicy jalapeño ranch.

Taco Plate (3)

Chicken or steak tacos topped with chopped onions & cilantro. Shrimp available.

Something Sweet

New York Style Cheesecake

Classic NY style cheesecake with choice of raspberry, strawberry, caramel or chocolate syrup.

Ice Cream

Two scoops — vanilla, chocolate or strawberry.

Lava Chocolate Cake

Gooey chocolate cake with vanilla ice cream & chocolate sauce.

Flourless Chocolate Cake

Chocolate cake with chocolate mousse & dark chocolate ganache.

Carrot Cake

Moist carrot cake with raisins, walnuts & pineapple topped with cream cheese icing.

Cocktails

Mad Luv

Osadia blanco, Grand Marnier, lime, agave

Twisted Old Fashioned

Maker's Mark, simple syrup, Angostura bitters, orange peel

Tropical Fantasy

Bacardi white & Kraken dark rum, cream of coconut, pineapple, lime

Violet Beauregarde

Malibu coconut rum, butterfly pea flower tea, ginger beer

Ay Papi

Smoke infused Old Forester rye, demerara, vanilla, bitters, orange peel

Pop Star

Osadia blanco, mango passionfruit shrub, vanilla bean puree, Cointreau, lime, tajín

Room 6520

In-house twisted moonshine, strawberries, lime, hibiscus sugar, soda

Pin-Up

Ford's gin, jalapeño, lime, agave

Consuming raw or undercooked meats, poultry, seafood, shellfish or eggs may increase your risk of foodborne illness, especially if you have certain medical conditions. Our gluten free items are prepared in a common kitchen; exposure to flour is possible. Our gluten free items are not recommended for guests with Celiac or any other gluten sensitive disorder.

CMS_EVENTS_PAGE_BODY: Happy hour Monday through Thursday, karaoke, Ladies Lounge, live music, and weekend brunch — something on the calendar every day of the week.
CMS_EVENTS_PRIVATE_BODY: Planning a birthday, corporate event, or large group? Call us and our team will follow up with details.
CMS_FEATURES_GRID:
🍸

Handcrafted Cocktails

Signature cocktails, draft beers on tap, wine, and specialty pours from our full bar.

💨

Hookah Lounge

Upscale lounge seating and premium hookah — ask your server for flavors and pricing.

📺

Sports Bar

175″ LED wall, 150″ screen, and large TVs in every corner — all paired with a hi-fi audio system for game day and live events.

🔥

Fire-Grilled Plates

Burgers, wings, tacos, and fan favorites from our kitchen — cooked to order and served hot.

🌿

Patio & Courtyard

Covered patio and open-air courtyard seating — brunch, dinner, or drinks under the Texas sky.

🎵

Live Music

Live music every Friday and Saturday night — feel the beat at Twisted.

🥂

Weekend Brunch

Saturday R&B brunch and Sunday paint & sip brunch, both 11 AM – 4 PM.

Review us on Google
CMS_REVIEWS_CAROUSEL:
V

Vidya Garapati

G 2 months ago

Amazing experience! Great ambience, perfect music, and top-notch service. The drinks were spot on, and the food was fresh and delicious. Definitely coming back!

M

Megan Mitchell

G 1 month ago

Perfect spot to unwind with hookah. The energy is lively without being overwhelming, music hits just right, and the staff was cool. A go-to for a chill night out.

C

Chaitanya Kumar

G 1 week ago

The music selection was fantastic and the DJ kept the crowd engaged. The courtyard was my favorite — hookah and cocktails under the trees felt like a resort. Flavorful food and great service.

J

Jenu

G 3 months ago

A great sports bar with an extensive beer selection, solid food menu, and lively atmosphere. Perfect for catching a game and enjoying a cold drink with friends.

C

Crystal T.

G 4 months ago

Overall, 9 out of 10. I will be going back.
